use_cases: Triggering form submissions with different visual weights using variant props
Creating navigation action buttons with outline and ghost styles
Building destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Implementing icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Composing button-as-child patterns for polymorphic component hierarchies
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and CVA for composable variant and size styling. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon) with accessible focus states and disabled handling. Fully typed with TypeScript and integrates with Tailwind CSS utility classes via cn helper.
